name: Mini Notes
tagline: A simple note-taking app with LLM-powered summarization.
description:
Mini Notes lets you create, view, and delete short notes. All notes are persisted through Anna's storage Host API (anna.storage.*). When you click Summarize, the frontend invokes a bundled Executa tool via anna.tools.invoke; the tool issues a reverse JSON-RPC sampling/createMessage request to borrow the host LLM for summarization.

**Key concepts demonstrated**
- Anna App manifest with storage and tool host API permissions
- anna.storage.get/set for CRUD operations
- anna.tools.invoke to call a local Executa tool
- Executa protocol v2 with initialize/describe/invoke lifecycle
- Reverse RPC sampling/createMessage for host LLM access
- Binary packaging with pkg for multi-platform distribution
